it.hero.subtitle: Monitora, comprendi e controlla il tuo dispositivo Apple in modo semplice e veloce. RAM, CPU, GPU, BATTERIA, NETWORK, SENSORI e molto altro — tutto a colpo d'occhio.

it.privacy.quote: Device Monitor² è progettata con la privacy al centro. L'app non raccoglie dati personali, né dati non personali. Nessun analytics, nessun tracciamento, nessuna telemetria nascosta. Tutte le informazioni che vedi rimangono esclusivamente sul tuo dispositivo.

en.nav.aria.cta: Download Device Monitor² on the App Store
en.hero.subtitle: Monitor, understand and control your Apple device quickly and easily. RAM, CPU, GPU, BATTERY, NETWORK, SENSORS and much more — all at a glance.
en.hero.aria.download: Download Device Monitor² on the App Store
en.features.label: Features
en.features.title: Everything you need
en.features.subtitle: Dedicated information panels, each designed to give you clear, immediate control over your Apple device.
en.kits.label: Premium Kits
en.kits.title: Expand the features
en.kits.subtitle: The app is completely free. In-app Kits are optional one-time purchases, with no subscriptions.
en.kits.price.label: one-time purchase
en.gallery.label: Screenshots
en.gallery.title: See the app
en.gallery.subtitle: Browse screenshots on iPhone, iPad, Mac and Apple Watch. Tap an image to enlarge it.

en.compat.title: The entire ecosystem
en.compat.subtitle: One app, four platforms. From iPhone to Apple Watch, Device Monitor² works across the entire Apple ecosystem.
en.changelog.label: Changelog
en.changelog.title: Always up to date,
en.changelog.subtitle: The latest releases, with all new features and improvements.
en.press.label: Press
en.press.title: Device Monitor²
en.press.subtitle: Articles, reviews and videos from creators and publications worldwide.
en.privacy.label: Privacy-first
en.privacy.title: Zero data collected.
en.privacy.quote: Device Monitor² is designed with privacy at its core. The app collects no personal or non-personal data. No analytics, no tracking, no hidden telemetry. All information you see stays exclusively on your device.
en.cta.title: Ready to take
en.cta.body: Free, no subscriptions, no data collection. Available on the App Store for iPhone, iPad, Apple Watch and Mac.
en.footer.desc: A one-of-a-kind app that keeps all your device information at your fingertips, quickly and easily.
